rows.label: qev056002_MSG0002
rows.name:
I want you to defeat ten Bio Nalki in the Black Steel Continent
using the weapon Han'boiton gave you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056002_MSG0003
rows.name:
If you do that, the Bio Nalki shouldn't
divide and multiply anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056002_MSG0004
rows.name:
Thanks for completing such a dangerous mission.
That area should be a little safer now.[ST:wait ]
